\caption{Fix-strategy distribution for correcting nvBench SQL errors.}
\label{tab:nvbench-fix-strategies}
\begin{tabular}{lrrl}

Fix strategy & Count & Percent (\%) & Majority risk \\
\midrule

\end{tabular}
\end{table}
